normalized_shade_records.mixing_ratio: 1:1 (SoColor Blended Collection + Matrix Cream Developer)
developer_options: Matrix Cream Developer (volume per desired lift; line-level developer chart: 10 Vol up to 1 level, 20 Vol up to 2, 30 Vol up to 3, 40 Vol up to 4)
normalized_shade_records.special_usage_notes: Blended Collection, Cool Palette (manual pp.37-38). Tone code appears under the 'Power Cools' label on the SoColor color wheel (manual decoding section). FAQ: 'Power Cools: Ultra Cool, low-ammonia shades up to 50% gray coverage. Pre-blended with Brown/Beige Background.' FAQ processing time for Power Cools: 30min; lift up to 4 levels.
normalized_shade_records.source_document: 2023 Matrix Manual Haircolor (official PDF, 82 pages, cover: '2023 Manual Haircolor')
assumptions: Mixing ratio, developer, processing time, gray-coverage and lift values are stated in the manual at the collection level, not per individual shade; applied here to each shade of that collection.
data_gaps: Processing time stated as a range (30-45 minutes room temperature; full 45 minutes when lifting more than 1 level and when depositing on gray) - see line record; scalar field left null.
Shade name not printed per shade in the 2023 manual (palette charts show codes only); shade_name left null.

SR Series is intermixable within itself. Highlighter processing: up to 15 minutes with heat, let cool 5 minutes room temperature. Booster processing: 30 minutes room temperature. Do not use Extra Blonding Cream with SoRed.

normalized_shade_records.special_usage_notes: Ultra Blonde Collection (manual pp.43-44). UL-A+, UL-V+, UL-N+ - Maximum Lift. Shades are not intermixable with other SoColor shades. Process full 50 minutes for maximum lift + neutralization. Do not use for: refreshing mid-lengths/ends, toning pre-lightened or highlighted hair, removing color, lightening previously colored hair. FAQ: 'The + in the Ultra-Blondes series means more lift.'
normalized_shade_records.source_document: 2023 Matrix Manual Haircolor (official PDF, 82 pages, cover: '2023 Manual Haircolor')

manufacturer_tone_descriptions: Extra Blonding Cream: 'Additive for SoColor permanent hair color that helps disperse natural underlying pigment so blondes are cleaner, reds are brighter and browns are richer.'
normalized_shade_records.color_type: Permanent cream haircolor ('Permanent Color'; Certified Vegan; Pre-Bonded, Pre-Blended, Pre-Paired)
normalized_shade_records.mixing_ratio: 3:1 (1.5 oz. SoColor + 0.5 oz. Extra Blonding Cream + 2 oz. Matrix Cream Developer)
developer_options: Matrix Cream Developer (always add extra developer in proportion to the amount of Extra Blonding Cream added)
normalized_shade_records.special_usage_notes: Extra Blonding Cream additive, shown on Ultra Blonde palette as 'EBC' (manual pp.43-46). Mix into SoColor Blended + Reflect Series. Best for virgin applications when additional clarity is needed and to lighten 'banding' from color overlap. Do not use with the UL Series, SoRed or HD Series. Processing: 30-45 minutes room temperature. Not a shade; a formula booster/additive.
normalized_shade_records.source_document: 2023 Matrix Manual Haircolor (official PDF, 82 pages, cover: '2023 Manual Haircolor')
data_gaps: Processing time stated as a range (30-45 minutes); scalar left null.
No level or tone; this is an additive, not a colour shade.
Shade name not printed per shade in the 2023 manual (palette charts show codes only); shade_name left null.

normalized_shade_records.gray_coverage_claim: 100% gray coverage in 10 minutes
normalized_shade_records.mixing_ratio: 1:1 (SoColor 10 min + 20 Volume (6%) Matrix Cream Developer); color + developer in every pouch
developer_options: 20 Volume (6%) Matrix Cream Developer (included in pouch)
normalized_shade_records.special_usage_notes: SoColor 10 min Pre-Bonded collection (manual pp.51-52); one of the '8 different technologies' of SoColor per the manual FAQ, also branded separately as 'SoColor 10 min Pre-Bonded'. 10 neutral shades. 5-minute buffer window to control over-processing between minutes 10-15. Can be mixed with: only other SoColor 10 min shades. After first application do not pull through ends; SoColor Sync recommended for refreshing.

manufacturer_tone_descriptions: Clear (decoding p.110): 'Use with other shades to reduce tonal deposit by 1 level when mixed equally. Use alone to add shine without changing tone. Available in Alkaline and Acidic.'
normalized_shade_records.mixing_ratio: 1:1 (SoColor Sync Clear + Matrix 10 Volume (3%) Cream Developer)
normalized_shade_records.special_usage_notes: SoColor Sync Clear (manual pp.97-98). Best for diluting SoColor Sync alkaline shades and adding shine. Adding an equal amount of Clear to any SoColor Sync shade will lessen the color deposit by approximately one level. Alkaline Clear can also dilute a Fast Toner shade (1:1). Palette chart footnote: '*Available in Alkaline & Acidic Technologies'.

normalized_shade_records.mixing_ratio: 1:1 (SoColor Sync + 10 Volume (3%) Matrix Cream Developer); may be diluted with SoColor Sync alkaline Clear in a 1:1 ratio
normalized_shade_records.special_usage_notes: SoColor Sync Fast Toners (manual pp.101-102): 'Highly pigmented oxidative dyes for express pre-toning.' Apply to clean towel-dried hair at the sink/back bar. Processing 2-5 minutes. No background - pure toned, fully pigmented. Can be used on natural hair. Leaving on longer than 5 minutes can lead to over-deposit and possible shift in natural level. Can be mixed with: SoColor Sync Alkaline Clear only (Alkaline shades should not be mixed with Fast shades).

manufacturer_tone_descriptions: High-shine, fast-acting, progressive demi-permanent tones made for rich, deep, lower-level deposit. The Express Tones After Dark collection is formulated to deposit on any level of hair. PRAVANA’s ammonia-free 5-15 minute tones for brunettes. Achieve rich lower-level deposit on levels 7 and below.
normalized_shade_records.mixing_ratio: 1:1.5 (1 part Express Tones : 1.5 parts ChromaSilk Zero Lift Creme Developer)
normalized_shade_records.special_usage_notes: Shampoo and towel dry hair. Mix chosen shade with Zero Lift Developer at a 1 : 1½ ratio, apply at the shampoo bowl with a brush and bowl, or with a bottle applicator. Leave on for the indicated time needed to achieve the target level. Rinse, condition and style as desired.
normalized_shade_records.source_document: PRAVANA official product page (after-dark-mahogany)

With a 3oz tube of ChromaSilk Creme Hair color and a mixing ratio of 1:1.5, you gain 7.5 oz of working product. 7.5 oz of working product provide a cost savings of $0.88 per mixed oz.
normalized_shade_records.special_usage_notes: In a non-metallic bowl, mix 1 part permanent color with 1.5 parts creme developer 10-40V (1:1½), and apply color. Process for 30 minutes — up to 45 minutes for gray coverage.
normalized_shade_records.source_document: PRAVANA official product page (4-4-copper-brown)

ChromaSilk is enriched with pure Silk and Keratin Amino Acids to provide shine, silkiness and long-lasting color. With a 3oz tube of ChromaSilk Creme Hair color and a mixing ratio of 1:1.5, you gain 7.5 oz of working product. 7.5 oz of working product provide a cost savings of $0.88 per mixed oz.
normalized_shade_records.special_usage_notes: In a non-metallic bowl, mix 1 part permanent color with 1.5 parts creme developer 10-40V (1:1½), and apply color. Process for 30 minutes — up to 45 minutes for gray coverage.

manufacturer_tone_descriptions: PRAVANA’s next evolution of permanent hair color that bridges the gap between permanent creme hair color and direct dye. Use alone, intermix with each other, or with any ChromaSilk Permanent Creme hair color for beautiful, creative options.
Features: Permanent VIVIDS hair color. Intermixable with any ChromaSilk Creme hair color.
normalized_shade_records.gray_coverage_claim: Permanent VIVIDS hair color. Intermixable with any ChromaSilk Creme hair color.
normalized_shade_records.mixing_ratio: Use 10V for max deposit or 20V for lighter results (no high-volume developer)
normalized_shade_records.special_usage_notes: No need to use with high volume developer. Use 10 volume for maximum deposit or 20 volume for lighter, brighter results. Levels 1 through 5, use 50% VIVIDS Everlasting shade in order to see the tone it contributes. – Levels 6 through 10, use 25% VIVIDS Everlasting shade in order to see the tone it contributes. – For up to 100% gray coverage, use 25% VIVIDS Everlasting + 75% ChromaSilk Permanent Creme Hair Color
normalized_shade_records.source_document: PRAVANA official product page (bewitching-blue)
